title: Paul Reubens
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Citation}} {{Person |image=[[File:PaulReubens.jpg]] |name=Paul Reubens |birth=[[August 27]], [[1950s|1952]]{{ThisWeek|3Hg6c54Aivg|Star Wars Celebration Merchandise, Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge Gets Animated, and More!}}
[[Wikipedia:Peekskill, New York|Peekskill]], [[Wikipedia:New York (state)|New York]]{{WebCite|url=https://deadline.com/2023/07/paul-reubens-dead-pee-wee-herman-obituary-actor-was-70-1235451477|text=Paul Reubens Dies: Pee-wee Herman Actor Was 70|author=Greg Evans|date=2023-07-30|work=[[Wikipedia:Deadline Hollywood|''Deadline'']]|archivedate=20230912235952}} |death=[[July 30]], [[2023]] |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:United States|American]] |occupation=*Actor *Writer *Comedian |companies= |website=[https://peewee.com peewee.com] }} '''Paul Reubens''' (born '''Paul Rubenfeld''') ([[August 27]], [[1950s|1952]] — [[July 30]], [[2023]]), was an [[Wikipedia:United States|American]] actor, writer, and comedian, best known professionally for his character Pee-wee Herman. As Pee-wee Herman, he appeared in the films [[Wikipedia:Pee-wee's Big Adventure|''Pee-wee's Big Adventure'']] ([[1985]]) and [[Wikipedia:Big Top Pee-wee|''Big Top Pee-wee'']] ([[1988]]), as well as the Saturday-morning television series [[Wikipedia:Pee-wee's Playhouse|''Pee-wee's Playhouse'']]. In [[1986]], he was the voice of Max, the robotic controller of an alien spacecraft in the children's science fiction film [[Wikipedia:Flight of the Navigator|''Flight of the Navigator'']], for which he was credited as Paul Mall. ==Biography== In [[1987]], Reubens provided the voice for [[RX-24/Legends|RX-24]], the [[RX-Series pilot droid]] featured in the [[Star Tours (real-world)|Star Tours]] ride at various [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] theme parks. While the ride was still in operation, Reubens' voice could be heard as "Rex." Rex makes a minor appearance in [[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]], using archive audio. He later reprised the role of RX-24 in the [[Disney XD]] animated series ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'', in the episode "[[Droids in Distress]]" and for Galaxy's Edge as [[R-3X|DJ R-3X]] in [[Oga's Cantina]]. He passed away from cancer on [[July 30]], [[2023]]. ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{OfficialSite|url=https://peewee.com|archivedate=20020125080818}} *{{WP|Paul Reubens}} *{{DisneyWiki|Paul Reubens}} *{{IMDb|name/nm0000607}} [[Category:Deceased actors]] [[Category:Star Tours voice actors]] [[Category:Star Wars Rebels voice actors]]
